metadata.purpose: Track all scanner weight changes for rollback capability and learning analysis

max_score.note: Added short interest (+30), explosive volume (+30), gap detection (+20), market cap tiers (+15), ultra-low float tier (+10)

ultra_tiny_5m.note: NEW tier for <5M shares - jackpot squeeze potential

short_interest_scoring.note: NEW - Professional hedge fund short squeeze detection

explosive_volume_scoring.note: NEW - Multi-tier detection for both VIGL stealth and CDIO explosions

gap_detection_scoring.note: NEW - Premarket momentum and recovery signals

market_cap_scoring.note: NEW - Phase 1 early filtering + Phase 3 tiered scoring. $1B max aligns with hedge fund $500M-$1.5B sweet spot

etf_filtering.note: Enhanced - Added 20+ ETFs (FXI, IEFA, KWEB, MSTU, etc.) + API verification

weight_changes.rationale: V3.2 Explosive Edition designed to find stocks like ChatGPT's winners: VIGL +324%, CRWV +171%, AEVA +162%, CRDO +108%. Integrates professional hedge fund strategies: short squeeze detection, explosive volume analysis, micro-cap targeting.

expected_performance.ideal_candidates: Micro-caps <$1B, ultra-low float <10M, high short interest >25%, volume spikes 10-100x
expected_performance.risk: Higher volatility due to micro-cap focus, managed with 15% stops

previous_weights_backup.note: V3.1 weights - revert here if V3.2 underperforms

performance_tracking.note: Add entries here as scanner performance data accumulates
